positive: Intricate botanical cross-section illustration of a celestial flower (Moonpetal Bloom). Vintage scientific etching style, detailed line work, copperplate engraving aesthetic. The flower is surrounded by orbiting moons and stars. Muted earth tones, academic illustration, highly detailed, perfect for a journal cover.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, modern colors, watercolor bleed
